title: No GUI
description: A resource pack that makes your GUI transparent
body:
# No GUI
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fab6cae4bd44a43880b036a9e9bebab14a319b3_0.webp)
## Describe
No GUI is a special resource pack that makes the entire interface in Minecraft transparent, providing a realistic and unobstructed experience. With a minimalist design and a focus on pure visuals, this pack is perfect for focusing on PvP and enjoying the Minecraft world naturally, smoothly and without distractions.
## Instruct
- Download resource pack (.zip)
- Put the downloaded resource pack into the folder:
```
.minecraft/resourcepack
```
- Open your Minecraft, Options → Resource Packs → select No GUI pack → Done

_*Note: If you see the wrong version message while you are running the correct version, just use it normally._
